task.domains: (topic task) (topic hi-d) (topic ui-d) (topic sw-d) (topic indexing-d) (topic ut-d) a(base ishcondition) a(base varid) a(base varref) a(base cid) a(base partslist) (topic oce-d) (topic sdlVariables-c) (topic oceCommonElements-c) (topic oceMetaDecl-c) (topic oceTopic-c) (topic oceTopic-c task oceTask-c) (topic oceTopic-c hi-d oceHighlight-c) (topic oceTopic-c ui-d oceUi-c) (topic oceTopic-c sw-d oceSoftware-c)
task.title: How to execute an upgrade, downgrade change of a license

abstract.p: The license mechanism is described here: License mechanism
When a customer requested an additional license, or a license was forgotten, or a license is removed, a license change needs to be done in the backoffice system.
When a license change is done in the backoffice ILMS system, the updated license file needs to be transferred to the engine and activated on the engine.

section.title: There are 2 ways a license can be transferred and activated

li.p: The engine has an active ORS connection, the updated container is transferred to engine within 10 minutes via the ORS connection.
The following procedure: Install a license via ORS needs to be executed.
This can be done by the customer or the technician.
The Backoffice engineer can send the license update file directly to technician or customer.
The following procedure: Install a license received via e-mail
This needs to be executed by the technician:
For the customer this procedure is also described in the user guide
For download: Operation and Safety information
